sql_array: CREATE TABLE exp_test (id INT, value DOUBLE PRECISION);
INSERT INTO exp_test (id, value) VALUES (1, exp(1));
UPDATE exp_test SET value = exp(2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, concat('The EXP of 2 is: ', cast(value as varchar)) FROM exp_test;
INSERT INTO exp_test (id, value) VALUES (2, exp(-1));
